mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_sessions ( user_id, token_id, device_info, ip_address, user_agent, is_active, is_revoked, created_at, last_active_at, expires_at, revoked_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{tokenId}, CAST(#{deviceInfo, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler} AS jsonb), #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{isActive}, #{isRevoked}, #{createdAt}, #{lastActiveAt}, #{expiresAt}, #{revokedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_sessions SET is_active = #{isActive}, is_revoked = #{isRevoked}, last_active_at = #{lastActiveAt}, revoked_at = #{revokedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_sessions WHERE token_id = #{tokenId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM user_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = true ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM user_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM user_sessions WHERE token_id = #{tokenId} AND is_active = true AND is_revoked = false
